data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the commission configuration, specifically that it is set to 60% for stylists and 40% for the salon. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or data points that confirm this specific commission split. The linked use case mentions commission tracking but does not specify the required configuration percentages, leading to a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of commission configuration per provider set to 60% for stylist and 40% for salon.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add commission configuration validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the commission configuration is set to 60% for stylist and 40% for salon.
